name: Psychosocial Therapy Procedure Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for psychosocial therapy services including individual, group, and family psychotherapy, as well as biofeedback and community-based rehabilitation. Used in behavioral health follow-up and engagement measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Family psychotherapy without the patient present, 50 minutes
Family psychotherapy with the patient present, 50 minutes
Group psychotherapy (other than of a multiple-family group)
Individual psychophysiological therapy incorporating biofeedback; 30 minutes
Individual psychophysiological therapy incorporating biofeedback; 45 minutes
